findings.location: s3 — format definition file code example
findings.description: The inline field-description comments were stripped from the format definition file code example. The source includes comments such as `# 1. データ区分`, `# 2. 振込先金融機関コード`, `# 3. 振込先金融機関名称`, `# 4. 振込先営業所コード`, etc. on every field line, providing the business meaning (Japanese name) of each field. Also stripped are the parenthetical field notes: `# (手形交換所番号)` and `# (未使用領域)`. These comments are part of the documentation of the sample format and aid understanding of what each field represents.
findings.source_evidence: Source lines such as: `1    dataKbn       X(1)  "2"      # 1. データ区分` / `2    FIcode        X(4)           # 2. 振込先金融機関コード` / `39  ?tegataNum     X(4)  "9999"   # (手形交換所番号)` / `114 ?unused        X(7)  pad("0") # (未使用領域)`

findings.description: The s1 hints are missing `ゾーン10進数` and `パック10進数` (or `パック形式`). The source explicitly lists "パックおよびゾーン10進数形式のサポート" as a named feature of the library. These are specific technical terms a user might search for when asking about host-environment data format support.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `EBCDICへの対応や、パックおよびゾーン10進数形式のサポートなど、ホスト環境での利用を想定した機能`
